Health Adviser

A smart digital health companion designed to help you track blood pressure, manage prescriptions, receive AI-powered wellness plans, and stay in control of your health.

About Health Adviser

Health Adviser is a secure digital health management platform built to simplify everyday healthcare. From storing prescriptions to monitoring blood pressure trends, we provide tools that help you make informed decisions about your well-being.

Our system combines medical best practices with intelligent data analysis to deliver personalized health insights and structured wellness recommendations.

Our Vision

To make proactive health management accessible, understandable, and actionable for everyone. We envision a future where individuals can monitor their health metrics, understand prescriptions clearly, and receive personalized guidance — all in one place.

Why Choose Health Adviser

  • ✔ Secure storage of prescriptions and medical reports
  • ✔ AI-powered wellness plans based on BMI and medical history
  • ✔ Blood pressure tracking with weekly history analysis
  • ✔ Smart medicine reminders to improve adherence
  • ✔ Clean, easy-to-use dashboard experience

How It Works

  1. Create your profile and securely log in.
  2. Upload prescriptions or enter them manually.
  3. Track blood pressure and monitor weekly trends.
  4. Set medicine reminders to never miss a dose.
  5. Receive personalized AI health insights based on your data.

Contact Us

Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.

📧 Email: support@healthadviser.app
📞 Phone: +91 98765 43210
📍 Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India
